body:
how do we get them to disappove


----- Original Message ----
From: "jpm6929@aol.com" <jpm6929@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Sunday, September 2, 2007 4:43:10 PM
Subject: Re : (no subject)

Jeffrey, of course I am working on all this; I think I will send you a schedule of my days (including weekends) so you can realize the time I spend with you (I mean the project ,or all what pertains to it). I forgot to tell you that Thursday I went to Prague, it went very very well.
 I will send you the images of all your querries as soon as I get to N.York, because I want to trick them in Photoshop.
September 14 is the day the city (Paris) aproves or not Qatar for THE LEASE OF LAMBERT, 105 YEARS, they only need some letters of TRUE neighbours opposing the arabs to turn them arround.
I am trying by the way to collect 75.000 euros to restore the ceiling of Prague, through W.M.Fund, that way I can have unlimited acces to the source...I will see you very soon,J.P. 





-----E-mail d'origine--
De : J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>

Envoyé le : Dimanche 2 Sep 2007 18:19
Sujet : (no subject)


jp. I still don't have the things we 've talked about.. images of main house,

, nursery details , spa details, guest house area or kitchen interiors.
